title: Rendlesham UFO files could soon be released according to former US Pentagon official
description: A filmmaker and UFO expert is hopeful that the US Government will release unseen files on the Rendlesham Forest UFO incident in December 1980.

title: Pentagon releases new batch of UFO files
description: The files include over 40 videos requested by lawmakers. NewsNation will be reviewing the files and providing analysis.

title: UFO enthusiasts hail latest batch of Pentagon X-files as 'best evidence yet' of alien visitors
description: A new batch of over 200 files has today been released by the Pentagon – containing remarkable video of what appear to be spherical aircraft of unknown origin

title: US: Pentagon releases second batch of UFO declassified footage
description: The Pentagon releases 64 UFO documents as Trump orders second batch of declassified footage.

title: Trump UFO dump reveals 'mind-boggling' tech as humans may not be 'apex predator' anymore
description: Experts claim Donald Trump's new UFO file dump proves the US military is hiding alien technology because they hate admitting humans aren't the apex predator
